0.name: The Nexus of Echoes — Central Chamber
0.description: You stand in a vast circular chamber. The walls shimmer with an iridescent light that seems to pulse in rhythm with your heartbeat. Six massive archways ring the perimeter, each radiating a distinct energy. In the center, a cracked obsidian pedestal holds nothing — but a faint circular groove in its surface suggests something once rested here. Something round.

interactables.description: The obsidian pedestal is cracked but solid. A perfectly circular groove is worn into its surface — about the size of a marble. Dust has settled in the groove, but a thin trail leads away from it, as if something rolled off recently.

1.name: The Nexus — Northern Archway
1.description: The northern archway pulses with a warm golden light. Beyond it, you can see rolling green hills and the distant spires of a castle. The air smells of pine and old stone. A sign carved into the arch reads: 'The Shattered Crown — Realm of High Fantasy.'

interactables.description: The carved sign reads: 'The Shattered Crown — Realm of High Fantasy. Danger Level: Moderate. Recommended for newcomers.'

2.name: The Nexus — Eastern Archway
2.description: The eastern archway crackles with electric blue energy. Through it, neon signs flicker in an endless rain. Towering megastructures pierce a sky choked with smog and holographic advertisements. A digital readout above the arch displays: 'NEON GRID — SECTOR 7.'

interactables.description: The digital readout cycles through text: 'NEON GRID — SECTOR 7. Threat Assessment: HIGH. Augmentation recommended.'

3.name: The Nexus — Southern Archway
3.description: The southern archway is wreathed in shadow and the faint glow of a streetlamp. Through it, rain falls on wet cobblestones. A saxophone plays somewhere in the distance. The arch bears a brass plaque: 'Midnight Rain — The Noir District.'

interactables.description: The brass plaque reads: 'Midnight Rain — The Noir District. Danger Level: Moderate-High. Trust no one.'

4.name: The Nexus — Western Archway
4.description: The western archway radiates heat and the smell of gunpowder. Through it, palm trees sway against an orange sunset. An explosion echoes in the distance. Spray-painted across the arch in bold red letters: 'BLOOD & CHROME — NO RULES, NO MERCY.'

interactables.description: The spray paint reads: 'BLOOD & CHROME — NO RULES, NO MERCY. Danger Level: HIGH. Bring ammo.'

5.name: The Nexus — Upper Platform
5.description: A spiral staircase leads up to a floating platform above the central chamber. From here you can see all six archways below. Two more passages branch off — one shimmering with cherry blossoms and crackling energy, the other heavy with the dust of ages.

6.name: The Nexus — Floating Shards Passage
6.description: Cherry blossom petals drift through the air despite no visible trees. The passage ahead opens into a sky filled with floating islands. Lightning arcs between distant peaks. A scroll pinned to the wall reads: 'The Floating Shards — Realm of Spirit and Steel.'

interactables.description: The scroll reads: 'The Floating Shards — Realm of Spirit and Steel. Danger Level: EXTREME. Master your focus or be shattered.'

7.name: The Nexus — Forgotten Epoch Passage
7.description: The air here is thick with the smell of old parchment and iron. Through the passage, torchlight flickers on sandstone walls. The distant roar of a crowd echoes from somewhere below. Chiseled into the stone above: 'THE FORGOTTEN EPOCH — WHERE EMPIRES FELL.'

interactables.description: The inscription reads: 'THE FORGOTTEN EPOCH — WHERE EMPIRES FELL. Danger Level: HIGH. History does not forgive.'

8.name: The Nexus — Training Hall
8.description: A side chamber off the main hub, fitted with practice dummies and weapon racks. A grizzled figure leans against the wall, arms crossed. This is where newcomers learn to fight.

interactables.description: Straw-stuffed practice dummies stand in a row. They look well-used.

9.name: The Nexus — The Bazaar
9.description: A bustling marketplace fills this wing of the Nexus. Stalls overflow with goods from every realm — enchanted blades beside plasma rifles, fedoras next to samurai helmets. A large board displays current listings from travelers who have passed through.

interactables.description: [Global Bazaar — player marketplace. Requires server connection.]

1000.name: The King's Road — Southern Gate
1000.description: You step through the archway and onto a worn cobblestone road. The golden light of the Nexus fades behind you, replaced by the warm sun of a medieval realm. Ahead, the road winds north through rolling farmland toward distant castle spires. A weathered milestone reads: 'Thornhold — 2 leagues.'

interactables.description: The milestone is cracked with age. It reads: 'Thornhold — 2 leagues. Beware the Hollow Wood.' Below it, scratched hastily: 'Something round rolled through here. Fast.'

1001.name: The King's Road — Farmlands
1001.description: Golden wheat fields stretch to either side of the road. A scarecrow stands motionless in the nearest field — or is it motionless? The road continues north toward a dark treeline.

interactables.description: On closer inspection, the scarecrow is definitely just a scarecrow. Definitely. Its button eyes stare blankly ahead. Wait — is that a marble-sized dent in the post it's mounted on?

1002.name: Edge of the Hollow Wood
1002.description: The road ends abruptly at a wall of ancient trees. Their branches interlock overhead, blocking all sunlight. A narrow path leads into the darkness. The air is cold here, and something watches from between the trunks.

interactables.description: The trees are impossibly old. Their bark is carved with runes you cannot read. Sap oozes from some of the carvings — it looks almost like the trees are bleeding.

1003.name: Abandoned Farmstead
1003.description: A ruined farmhouse sits amid overgrown fields. The roof has partially collapsed, and weeds grow through the floorboards. Someone — or something — has been living here recently. A cooking pot still smolders over dead coals.

interactables.description: The pot contains a thin, foul-smelling broth. Whatever made this wasn't human — or had very poor taste.

1004.name: The Hollow Wood — Dark Path
1004.description: The path twists between massive tree trunks. Luminescent fungi provide the only light — a sickly green glow that makes everything look diseased. You hear rustling in the undergrowth.

interactables.description: The fungi pulse with bioluminescence. They're not poisonous to touch, but you wouldn't want to eat them. A thin trail — like something small and round rolled through the moss — leads deeper into the wood.

1005.name: The Hollow Wood — Ancient Clearing
1005.description: A break in the canopy reveals a circle of standing stones. Moonlight streams down despite it being midday elsewhere. The stones hum with a low vibration you feel in your chest.

interactables.description: Seven standing stones form a perfect circle. Each bears a different rune. The ground at the center is worn smooth — as if something has been rolling in circles here for a very long time.

1006.name: The Hollow Wood — Spider Den
1006.description: Thick webs coat every surface. The path narrows to a crawl space choked with silk. Something large moves in the shadows above. This was a mistake.

interactables.description: The webs are incredibly strong. Wrapped in one of them, you can see the glint of something metallic.

1007.name: Thornhold — South Gate
1007.description: You emerge from the Hollow Wood to find a walled town ahead. The south gate stands open, guarded by two soldiers in dented armor. Beyond the walls, you can see rooftops and chimney smoke. A sign above the gate reads: 'THORNHOLD — Population: Declining.'

interactables.description: The guards look tired and underpaid. One nods at you. 'Another adventurer. Good luck in there. Watch for the rats — they've gotten bold since the crown shattered.'

1008.name: Thornhold — Market Square
1008.description: The town square is a muddy affair. A few merchants hawk their wares from rickety stalls. A fountain in the center has run dry — its basin filled with dead leaves. Roads lead in every direction.

interactables.description: The dry fountain has a small hole in its basin — perfectly round, as if drilled by something spinning at high speed. Water stains suggest something rolled through here when the fountain still flowed.

1009.name: The Eastern Tower (Top)
1009.description: The wind howls through the open arches of the tower. A torn piece of tapestry flutters in the breeze, depicting a rising sun.

1010.name: The Guardhouse
1010.description: Weapon racks stand empty. A heavy wooden table is overturned in the center of the room. A staircase leads down into darkness.

1011.name: The Guardhouse Cellar
1011.description: The cellar smells of mold and old wine. Barrels are smashed open. In the corner, a piece of tapestry shows a star shining in the night sky.

1012.name: The Inner Courtyard
1012.description: The heart of the castle. Statues of past kings line the walls, their faces worn away by time. The grand doors to the throne room lie to the north.

1013.name: The Chapel Ruins
1013.description: Stained glass windows lie shattered on the stone floor. A piece of tapestry draped over the altar depicts a flowing river.

1014.name: The Armory
1014.description: Most of the weapons here are rusted beyond use, but a few sturdy pieces remain untouched by the corruption.

1015.name: The Collapsed Library
1015.description: Bookshelves have collapsed, burying thousands of tomes. A single open book on a pedestal reads: 'The True King faces the rising sun, his shield to the flowing river, his sword to the setting sun, and his crown to the northern star.'

1016.name: The Throne Room Antechamber
1016.description: A long hall leading to the throne room. The air here is freezing cold, and the shadows seem to writhe along the walls.

1017.name: The Throne Room
1017.description: The grand throne room. Four stone statues surround a central throne. The statues can be rotated. The Usurper Wraith floats above the throne, its eyes burning with cold fire.

interactables.description: A stone statue of a king holding a sword. It can be rotated.
A stone statue of a king holding a shield. It can be rotated.
A stone statue of a king wearing a crown. It can be rotated.
A stone statue of a king with empty hands. It can be rotated.
The heavy stone throne. It looks like it could slide backward if the statues were aligned correctly.

2000.name: Sector 4 Gate
2000.description: A massive blast door marks the entrance to Sector 4. Neon signs flicker in the perpetual rain. The gateway back to the Nexus lies south.

2001.name: Noodle Alley
2001.description: Steam rises from a dozen food stalls. The smell of synthetic broth and ozone fills the air. A few locals huddle under umbrellas.

2002.name: The Gutter Market
2002.description: Scavengers sell tech scraps on blankets laid over the wet pavement. The neon glare is blinding here.

2003.name: Back Alley Clinic
2003.description: A sterile, white-tiled room hidden behind a rusty door. A surgical chair sits in the center, stained with old blood. A severed cyber-eye rests on a metal tray.

2004.name: Scavenger Den
2004.description: A makeshift shelter built from corrugated metal and stolen solar panels. It smells of unwashed bodies and cheap stims.

2005.name: Main Street (South)
2005.description: The narrow alley opens up into a wide avenue. Hover-cars streak past overhead. The rain falls harder here.

2006.name: Main Street (Central)
2006.description: The bustling heart of Sector 4. Holographic advertisements play on loop, promising a better life off-world.

2007.name: Main Street (North)
2007.description: The street ends at the imposing facade of the Data Exchange building. Security cameras track your every move.

2008.name: The Neon Bar
2008.description: A dimly lit dive bar. Synthetic jazz plays from a cracked speaker. A few patrons nurse glowing blue drinks.

2009.name: Abandoned Parking Garage
2009.description: Concrete pillars and oil stains. The ramp leads up to the roof. Shadows move in the corners.

2010.name: Garage Rooftop
2010.description: The rain lashes against the concrete roof. A defunct security drone lies in a heap, its casing pried open. A glowing power cell is still attached to its chassis.

2011.name: Maintenance Catwalk
2011.description: A narrow metal walkway connecting the garage to the adjacent building. It sways slightly in the wind.

2012.name: Data Exchange Lobby
2012.description: Sleek black marble and chrome. A security desk sits empty. An elevator leads up, but the doors are sealed.

2013.name: Security Office
2013.description: Monitors display static. A dead guard slumps over the console. An encrypted keycard lies on the desk.

2014.name: Server Room B
2014.description: Rows of humming server racks. The air is freezing. A terminal blinks with lines of green code.

2015.name: Data Exchange (Floor 2)
2015.description: Corporate offices, ransacked and abandoned. Papers litter the floor. The elevator continues up.

2016.name: Data Exchange (Floor 3)
2016.description: The executive level. The carpet is plush, but stained. A heavy security door blocks the way north.

2017.name: Executive Lounge
2017.description: Leather sofas and a shattered wet bar. A great view of the neon city below.

2018.name: Biometric Door
2018.description: A massive vault door. A retinal scanner glows red beside it. It requires a valid eye scan to open.

interactables.description: A high-tech retinal scanner. You could 'use charged-eye scanner' if you had one.

2019.name: The Mainframe Core
2019.description: The central data pillar has been smashed open from the inside. A security hologram plays on loop, showing a small, incredibly dense sphere shattering the reinforced glass casing and dropping into the cooling vents below. The vents are sealed — the marble has escaped into the infrastructure.
